verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Generations after generations Keep praising You, yet no word sums You up Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah" Generations after generations Keep praising You, yet no word sums You up Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah"

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yah, the hallowed one Yah, the holy one Yahweh, the King of Zion Yah, the hallowed one Yah, the holy one Yahweh, the King of Zion

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah" Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah" Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah" Then I ask the Lord, what name fits You? And He said "Yah"
